title: Spellblades n Such Unlimited - Temp fix for Prominence II
description: This Datapack Expands all Spellblades to have 8 enchanting slots instead of only 6, initially designed for Prominence II
body:
This Datapack adds the 8 Enchanting limit to the following weapons:

*   crystal cutlass
*   arcane Claymore 
*   flaming falchion
*   fire claymore
*   arcane claymore
*   frost claymore

Whilst this datapack does nothing on its own, it can be used to overwrite tags when used in conjunction with sortilege and spellblades and such. Initially made for prominence II i dont really see a reason to use this for anything else, but feel free to do so
